settings.list.remove: Remove the following desktop widget setup.
settings.load_widgets.description: Enable the loading of the widgets when the wallpaper changes.
settings.load_widgets.label: Load Widgets
settings.save_widgets.description: Enable saving the widgets whenever they are changed.
settings.save_widgets.label: Save Widgets
settings.tool_row.nuke.tooltip: Remove all setups. WARNING: THIS WILL REMOVE ALL THE OTHER SETUPS EXCEPT THE CURRENT ONE!
